name: getinorder
description: Plataforma de gerenciamento de tarefas. ## Tecnologias utilizadas JavaScript, React, Next.js, HTML, TailwindCSS, Supabase.

scripts.test: npm run test:disciplina && npm run test:usuario && npm run test:orquestrador
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:disciplina && npm run test:e2e:usuario && npm run test:e2e:orquestrador
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install:services && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:services: cd backend/disciplina-service && npm install && cd ../usuario-service && npm install && cd ../orquestrador && npm install
